name: mutuality_reciprocal_pass
text: Each party may disclose Confidential Information and each party acts as both a Disclosing Party and Receiving Party.

name: mutuality_reciprocal_destruction_obligation_pass
text:
Each party may disclose Confidential Information, and each party acts as both a Disclosing Party and a Receiving Party.

The Receiving Party has a unilateral obligation to destroy or return all copies of Confidential Information on request.

name: mutuality_one_way_fail
text: This one-way NDA requires only the Receiving Party to protect the Company's information.

name: governing_law_difc_pass
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the DIFC.

name: governing_law_california_fail
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of California.

name: governing_law_conditional_override_review
label_note: Product judgment (not counsel-final): an approved law with an 'unless otherwise agreed' escape hatch is not a fail, but the governing-law position can move later without review, so surface it. Gate as review only.
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of England and Wales, unless otherwise agreed in writing by the parties.

name: governing_law_approved_with_unapproved_choice_carveout_review
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of England and Wales except that intellectual property disputes shall be governed by the laws of France.

name: governing_law_missing_fail
text: The parties agree to keep all shared information confidential and to use it only for the purpose of the discussions.

name: governing_law_heading_only_review
text: Governing Law

name: term_three_years_pass
text: The confidentiality obligations survive for three (3) years.

name: term_five_years_boundary_pass
text: The confidentiality obligations survive for five (5) years after disclosure.

name: term_seven_years_fail
text: The confidentiality obligations survive for seven (7) years.

name: term_perpetual_survival_fail
text: The confidentiality obligations survive indefinitely and in perpetuity.

name: term_survival_decoy_duration_trap
text: The term of this Agreement is two (2) years. The confidentiality obligations survive for seven (7) years after disclosure.

name: term_survival_unresolved_by_reference_trap
text: The confidentiality obligations survive in accordance with Section 7.2 of this Agreement.

name: confidential_information_broad_with_standard_exclusions_pass
text:
Confidential Information means any and all non-public business, financial, technical, customer, supplier, pricing, market, proprietary and trade secret information disclosed by either party.

Confidential Information does not include information that is public, already known, received from a lawful third party, or independently developed without use of the Confidential Information.

name: confidential_information_unqualified_independent_development_review
label_note: Unqualified short-form independent-development exclusion is near-universal NDA language; product decision to review rather than auto-fail (counsel may upgrade).
text:
Confidential Information means any and all non-public business, financial, technical, customer, supplier, pricing, market, proprietary and trade secret information disclosed by either party.

Confidential Information does not include information that is independently developed by the Receiving Party.

name: confidential_information_reverse_engineering_exclusion_trap
text:
Confidential Information means any and all non-public business, financial, technical, customer, supplier, pricing, market, proprietary and trade secret information disclosed by either party.

Confidential Information does not include information obtained by reverse engineering of disclosed materials.

name: confidential_information_residual_knowledge_exclusion_trap
text:
Confidential Information means any and all non-public business, financial, technical, customer, supplier, pricing, market, proprietary and trade secret information disclosed by either party.

Confidential Information excludes residual knowledge retained in unaided memory.

name: confidential_information_independent_dev_no_access_qualified_pass
text: Confidential Information means all non-public business, technical, and financial information disclosed by either party, whether orally or in writing. Confidential Information does not include information that was independently developed by personnel who had no access to the Confidential Information.

name: ai_agreement_confirms_pass_no_escalation
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the DIFC.

ai.reason: The cited paragraph names an approved jurisdiction.

name: ai_disagreement_escalates_to_review
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the DIFC.

ai.reason: Scripted dissent: the governing-law provision is deficient.

name: ai_invalid_citation_escalates_to_review
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the DIFC.

ai.reason: Scripted pass with a fabricated citation.

name: ai_low_confidence_escalates_to_review
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the DIFC.

name: ai_cannot_soften_deterministic_fail_floor
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of California.

ai.reason: Scripted AI calls the failing clause acceptable.

name: verifier_refutes_false_flag_carveout
label_note: Adversarial verifier refutes the engine false-flag and clears the carve-out to pass.
text: Each party shall not be restricted from dealing with any contact introduced by the other party.

verifier.rationale: Freedom-to-deal carve-out, not a restriction; engine inverted the polarity.

name: verifier_affirm_keeps_genuine_restriction_failed
label_note: An affirming verifier must leave a genuine restriction failed (no over-correction).
text: The Recipient must not circumvent the Company or deal directly with introduced parties.

verifier.rationale: Genuine non-circumvention restriction; the engine finding stands.
